summary: Iteration 10 frontend-only test of (A) user-team yellow highlight in knockout brackets and (B) Extra-Time confirmation modal. TASK A passes 100%. TASK B passes the happy path but has a corner-case bug: when the engine produces ET with ZERO events (e.g., scoreless ET that goes to penalties), the et-confirm-modal is SKIPPED and play jumps straight from regulation to penalties — violating the spec. ROOT CAUSE in /app/frontend/src/screens/MatchScreen.jsx line 60: `const hasExtraTime = isKnockout && isLastLeg && extraTimeEvents.length > 0;` — should be based on the tie object's ET data (`!!tie?.et`) or decidedBy, not on whether events were generated. EVIDENCE: With Math.random forced to 0.999 (all xG misses), R16 finished decidedBy='penalties' with pen_block visible and TASK A bracket highlight visible, BUT et_modal_seen=false — the user never saw the 'Maç uzatmalara gidiyor' pause-screen before penalties played. TASK A live verification (screenshot at .screenshots/final_brackets2.png): user-knockout-card on SON 16 has class 'ring-2 ring-amber-300/70 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(252,211,77,0.25)]', label 'SENİN TAKIMIN' (count=1), 3 amber-text elements inside (team row + label). Highlight PERSISTS after user is eliminated (0-1 on penalties vs Real Madrid 2019). After auto-bracket-completion, the user's card stays amber while all other cards on QF/SF/Final are neutral white — exactly as spec'd. Group-stage user-row amber highlight (regression check) = 1 row across 8 groups, unchanged from prior iterations. TASK C regression: roll dice / draft / 6 matchday flow / advance-to-r16 / 2-leg LEG 1/2 İLK MAÇ + LEG 2/2 RÖVANŞ all work cleanly. data-testids added in iteration 10 verified live: user-knockout-card (R16 bracket), et-confirm-modal (NOT triggered in 0-event ET edge case), et-continue-button, match-event-et-N (not exercised due to edge case), penalty-block (rendered). PageError count: 0.

integration_issues.flow: Knockout match → Extra Time confirmation pause
integration_issues.issue: et-confirm-modal is SKIPPED when extra time produces zero events. /app/frontend/src/screens/MatchScreen.jsx line 60 computes `hasExtraTime` as `extraTimeEvents.length > 0` — but the engine appends et to the tie object whenever ET is played, regardless of whether any goals or saves occurred. When Math.random forces 0-0-0 in ET that goes to penalties, the screen transitions directly from minute-90 whistle → penalty-block without showing the 'Maç uzatmalara gidiyor' pause screen, violating the iteration-10 spec which says 'when a user's knockout tie ends regulation in a tied aggregate (i.e. heading to ET), the simulation must PAUSE'.

action_items: FIX MatchScreen.jsx line 60: change `const hasExtraTime = isKnockout && isLastLeg && extraTimeEvents.length > 0;` to `const hasExtraTime = isKnockout && isLastLeg && (!!tie?.et || (tie?.decidedBy === 'extra_time' || tie?.decidedBy === 'penalties'));`. Then guard the playing_et useEffect (line 99-118) to also handle the case where extraTimeEvents.length === 0 — it should still call sound.whistleEnd() and either go to penalties or done. Also the 'UZATMA BAŞLADI' text divider (line 288-291) should always render once playing_et starts (currently gated by etVisibleIdx===0 which is fine).

Consider also updating the bracket card UZATMA badge (TournamentScreen.jsx line 419-421) — currently it only shows when decidedBy='extra_time'; for decidedBy='penalties' where ET was 0-0 the user has no indication ET happened. Minor cosmetic.
critical_code_review_comments: BUG — /app/frontend/src/screens/MatchScreen.jsx:60 — hasExtraTime gating on extraTimeEvents.length excludes the 0-event ET → penalties scenario. The simulateExtraTime function in matchEngine.js can legitimately return empty events when xG misses combine with the 0.4 save threshold. Recommend gating on tie.et presence or decidedBy.

POSITIVE — /app/frontend/src/screens/MatchScreen.jsx phase state machine (line 25) is well-decomposed: kickoff → playing → et_confirm → playing_et → penalties → done. The separation of regulationEvents (≤90) vs extraTimeEvents (>90) at lines 54-55 is clean.

POSITIVE — /app/frontend/src/screens/MatchScreen.jsx et-confirm-modal (lines 298-317) is well-styled and accessible: clear Turkish copy, data-testid='et-confirm-modal' + data-testid='et-continue-button', DEVAM ET button calls startExtraTime() which sets phase='playing_et' and triggers whistleStart sound. UX is correct when triggered.

POSITIVE — /app/frontend/src/screens/TournamentScreen.jsx KnockoutCard (lines 399-424): isUserPair check via `pair.home?.isUser || pair.away?.isUser` is correct and works for both legs of a 2-leg tie. Amber ring class is non-conflicting with existing glass styling. data-testid='user-knockout-card' only applies when isUserPair=true (returns undefined otherwise) — clean conditional.

POSITIVE — /app/frontend/src/screens/TournamentScreen.jsx Row component (lines 426-441): amber-300 text + font-semibold on team.isUser regardless of isWin — exactly as spec'd ('user team row should show amber text-color even when losing'). 'SENİN TAKIMIN' sublabel (lines 434-436) renders inline below the team name. Vertically aligned with non-user 'SEZON · YYYY' subtext. Visually balanced.

NIT — TournamentScreen.jsx isUserPair only highlights the wrapper; if a future iteration needs to highlight individual rows differently (e.g., even when only one team in the pair is the user, the OPPONENT row should stay white), no change needed — current implementation correctly leaves the opponent in white/amber-on-win and only the user's row is forced amber.

NIT — KnockoutCard lines 416-421: 'PENALTILAR' and 'UZATMA' badges are mutually exclusive (`decidedBy === 'penalties'` vs `decidedBy === 'extra_time'`). For penalties games, no indicator shows that ET was played first — minor cosmetic since 'PENALTILAR' implies ET happened, but a 'UZATMA + PEN' combined badge would be clearer.

success_rate.frontend: 85% — TASK A (knockout highlight) 100% pass; TASK B (ET confirm modal) FAILS in 0-event ET edge case (modal skipped); TASK B2 implicit pass (modal wasn't shown for non-ET regulation results during group stage); TASK C regression all pass.

seed_data_creation: Injected localStorage 'ucl_draft_save_v1' with screen='tournament', formationId='4-3-3', 11 dummy 88-overall players matching 4-3-3 slot positions, tactic='TIKI_TAKA', tournament=null. Also set 'ucl_match_speed_v1'='ultra'. Used add_init_script to monkey-patch Math.random → 0.999 to force 0-0 regulation → ET → 0-0 ET → penalties path, which is exactly the codepath that exposed the et-confirm-modal skip bug.
context_for_next_testing_agent: (1) For ET testing, monkey-patch Math.random via add_init_script BEFORE page.goto so the override survives React's bundler load. Use 0.999 to force all-miss outcomes — produces aggregate-tied ET → 0-event ET → penalties. (2) The 2-leg knockout flow requires clicking [data-testid='next-leg-button'] between legs. ET only happens on the LAST leg (line 167 of matchEngine.js — leg2's events get ET appended). (3) After re-fix of hasExtraTime, retest by re-running the same seed (Math.random=0.999) — et-confirm-modal MUST appear before penalty-block. (4) Also test with Math.random producing ET WITH events (decidedBy='extra_time') — that path currently works correctly per code inspection. (5) TASK A is solid and does not need retesting unless TournamentScreen.jsx changes. (6) Note: TASK B2 (non-ET match should NOT show modal) was implicitly verified during group stage where 6 modals all closed directly via close-match-button without seeing et-confirm-modal — but explicit retest in knockout regulation-decided match is recommended after fix.
rca of the issue: BUG: MatchScreen.jsx line 60: `const hasExtraTime = isKnockout && isLastLeg && extraTimeEvents.length > 0;`. PROBLEM: extraTimeEvents is filtered from currentLeg.events by minute>90. simulateExtraTime in matchEngine.js can legitimately return empty events when both teams' xG checks miss AND the 0.4 save-threshold also fails — this happens when Math.random() outputs are in the wrong bands. The tie object will still have decidedBy='penalties' and tie.et={home:0,away:0,events:[]} attached. REPRO STEPS: (a) Inject completed draft savedState targeting tournament screen. (b) Play 6 matchdays to reach r16. (c) Override Math.random to always return 0.999. (d) Click play-r16-button. (e) Observe: regulation events stop at minute≤90 with both legs 0-0; modal advances to phase 'penalties' directly without rendering et-confirm-modal. EXPECTED: phase should pause at 'et_confirm' first, await DEVAM ET click, then proceed to penalties since ET also yielded no goals. FIX: gate hasExtraTime on tie.et existence (`!!tie?.et`) or decidedBy ('extra_time' or 'penalties'). Also ensure the playing_et phase still runs whistleEnd + transitions to penalties even when extraTimeEvents.length===0 (the existing useEffect at line 99-118 handles this correctly since etVisibleIdx>=0===0 immediately triggers the setTimeout).
